flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at James Madison University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.6k → $14.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at James Madison University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
